g.text: 1. We cannot decrease visibility of overridden methods in child class however we can increase visibility

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. We cannot change return type of overridden method in child class

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. We can change return type of overridden method in child class if its co-variant return type

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. We cannot change parameter list of overridden method in child class if we change it will be treated

g.text: 1. final class cannot be inherited (we cannot inherited from final class)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. final methods can be inherited however we cannot override them

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. final variable cannot be re iniatialized (nehave as constant)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Note : abstract and final cannot be used at once --> it is illegal combination

g.text: 3. We cannot create object/instance of abstract class

g.text: 4. We can create ref to achieve polymorphism
